ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vessel_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "reefer_mmsi" TEXT /* MMSI (Maritime Mobile Service Identity) of the reefer vessel */,
  "fishing_mmsi" TEXT /* MMSI (Mar Maritime Mobile Service Identity) of the fishing vessel */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the interaction event */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the interaction event */,
  "event_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the interaction event */,
  "event_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the interaction event */,
  "reefer_flag_iso3" TEXT /* ISO3 country code of the reefer vessel's flag */,
  "fishing_flag_iso3" TEXT /* ISO3 country code of the fishing vessel's flag */,
  "interaction_type" INTEGER /* Type of interaction (e.g., transshipment, illegal fishing) */,
  "reason" INTEGER /* Reason for the interaction (e.g., suspected illegal activity) */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the interaction (e.g., under investigation, resolved) */,
  "report_id" TEXT /* ID of the report associated with the interaction */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the interaction */,
  "interaction_depth" REAL /* Depth of the water where the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_temperature" REAL /* Water temperature during the interaction */,
  "nearest_land_distance" REAL /* Distance to the nearest land */,
  "nearest_port_distance" REAL /* Distance to the nearest port */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the interaction */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the interaction record */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who last updated the interaction record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the interaction record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the interaction record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_interactions_interaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type") REFERENCES interaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_interactions_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES interaction_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_interactions_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_interactions_reason FOREIGN KEY ("reason") REFERENCES interaction_reasons ("reason_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_interactions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_interactions_reefer_mmsi FOREIGN KEY ("reefer_mmsi") REFERENCES vessels ("mmsi"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_interactions_fishing_mmsi FOREIGN KEY ("fishing_mmsi") REFERENCES vessels ("mmsi"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_interactions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "mmsi" TEXT /* MMSI (Maritime Mobile Service Identity) of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of the vessel (e.g., reefer, fishing) */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "flag_iso3" TEXT /* ISO3 country code of the vessel's flag */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the vessel */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the vessel was registered */,
  "vessel_status" TEXT /* Status of the vessel (e.g., active, decommissioned) */,
  "imo_number" TEXT /* International Maritime Organization (IMO) number of the vessel */,
  "gross_tonnage" REAL /* Gross tonnage of the vessel */,
  "net_tonnage" REAL /* Net tonnage of the vessel */,
  "length_overall" REAL /* Overall length of the vessel */,
  "breadth" REAL /* Breadth of the vessel */,
  "draft" REAL /* Draft of the vessel */,
  "flag_state" TEXT /* Full name of the flag state */,
  "vessel_class" TEXT /* Class of the vessel */,
  "vessel_category" TEXT /* Category of the vessel */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the vessel record */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who last updated the vessel record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the vessel record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the vessel record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction reason */,
  "reason_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction reason */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "reporter_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who generated the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "weather_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data associated with the report */,
  "maritime_traffic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maritime traffic data associated with the report */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the report */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who last updated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the report */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES vessel_interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investigator, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
